name: Solana Breakpoint
location: Etihad Arena, Yas Island, Abu Dhabi, UAE (first Breakpoint held in the Middle East)
attendance: 7,000+ attendees from 100+ countries (sold out; ~1,800 founders present) — the largest Breakpoint to date
defi_themes: Stablecoins (USDC dominance on Solana; new yield-bearing stablecoins JupUSD, Streamflow USD+, Abra USDAF)
Institutional DeFi / TradFi convergence ('Everything Chain' / 'Revenue and Returns' framing)
Real-world asset (RWA) tokenization (>$2B tokenized RWAs by end-2025; gold, uranium, equities, domains, sovereign reserves)
On-chain capital markets (JPMorgan commercial paper, Galaxy Digital, State Street SWEEP fund, Figure native IPO, Paxos clearing agency)
Lending / credit (Jupiter Lend $1B supply in 8 days; Kamino institutional yield layer; Huma, Tala emerging-market credit)
Perpetuals / derivatives (Ellipsis Labs Phoenix Perps; dYdX spot on Solana)
DEXs and market microstructure (Jupiter Terminal, Coinbase DEX integration, Multicoin's ACE single global liquidity pool)
Yield infrastructure and institutional vaults (Kamino, RockawayX curated vaults, native treasury yield)
On-chain treasury / treasury management (Altitude CFO tools, Lightspeed IR platform, DAT / digital asset treasury trend)
Prediction markets going wallet-native (Phantom + Kalshi, dFlow)
Stablecoin / DeFi regulation (GENIUS Act compliance, OSL USDGO, Circle regulatory milestones)

notable_panels.title: Circle Fireside Chat with Jeremy Allaire
notable_panels.topic: Stablecoins / institutional DeFi — USDC volume on Solana outpacing other chains, regulatory compliance, blockchain-AI integration

notable_panels.title: Jupiter ecosystem updates — JupUSD launch and DeFi upgrades
notable_panels.topic: Stablecoins, lending, perps — JupUSD (backed ~90% BlackRock BUIDL, 10% USDC, native treasury yield, Ethena Labs collaboration); Jupiter Lend $1B supply in 8 days; Jupiter Terminal pro trading; Rain.fi acquisition for universal money market

notable_panels.title: Phoenix Perpetuals launch (Ellipsis Labs)
notable_panels.topic: Perpetual futures / derivatives — fully on-chain derivatives exchange with Prop AMM design for tighter spreads vs. offchain venues; closed beta launched Dec 11, 2025

notable_panels.title: Keel Finance Tokenization Regatta
notable_panels.topic: RWA tokenization / lending — $500M fund to stimulate native tokenized real-world assets; ~40 interested counterparties

notable_panels.title: Institutional RWAs on Solana (R3 Corda)
notable_panels.topic: Institutional RWA — Corda regulated RWA marketplace built on Solana for issuers and investors, launching early 2026

notable_panels.title: Coinbase x Solana DEX integration
notable_panels.topic: DEX — Coinbase integrating Solana into its DEX service to trade unlisted tokens directly in-app

notable_panels.title: Multicoin / ACE (Application-Controlled Execution)
notable_panels.topic: Market microstructure / DeFi liquidity — custom sorting rules over a single global liquidity pool to reduce DeFi fragmentation

notable_speakers.name: Dan Albert
notable_speakers.affiliation: Solana Foundation (Executive Director / CEO; closing remarks)

key_takeaways: Capital convergence was the dominant DeFi narrative: TradFi assets and DeFi rails merging into a unified global on-chain ledger, framed as 'Everything Chain' / 'Revenue and Returns' — Breakpoint shifted from crypto-native gathering toward an institutional finance summit.

Yield-bearing stablecoins were a marquee theme: Jupiter's JupUSD (backed ~90% by BlackRock's BUIDL fund + USDC, with Ethena Labs, returning native treasury yield) plus Streamflow USD+ and Abra's USDAF/sUSDAF; Circle reported USDC volume on Solana outpacing all other chains.

RWA tokenization went mainstream: tokenized RWAs surpassed ~$2B by end of 2025, with launches spanning gold (Oro StGOLD, Bhutan $TER, Singapore physical gold fund), uranium (Uranium Digital), equities (xStocks/WisdomTree), and domains (Doma), plus R3 Corda's regulated RWA marketplace.

On-chain institutional capital markets matured fast: JPMorgan arranged commercial paper for Galaxy Digital on mainnet, State Street launched a tokenized SWEEP liquidity fund (via PayPal PYUSD), Paxos filed for SEC clearing-agency status, and Figure filed for a native on-chain IPO — JPMorgan's own 'zero probability one year ago' framing underscored the speed.

DeFi lending and yield infrastructure scaled rapidly: Jupiter Lend hit $1B in supplied assets in 8 days (fastest on Solana); Kamino evolved into a full-stack institutional yield layer (fixed rates, private credit, RWA DEX); RockawayX launched curated institutional vaults.

On-chain derivatives and market structure advanced toward CEX parity: Ellipsis Labs' Phoenix Perps (Prop AMM for tighter spreads), dYdX bringing its first spot product to Solana, and Multicoin's ACE proposing a single global liquidity pool to reduce DeFi fragmentation.

Treasury/CFO tooling and DAT (digital asset treasury) themes emerged: Altitude (on-chain payroll, treasury, bookkeeping) and Lightspeed (first investor-relations/standardized-reporting platform for public blockchains).

Regulation/compliance underpinned institutional DeFi: GENIUS Act-compliant stablecoins (OSL USDGO), Circle's regulatory milestones, and Paxos/Figure SEC filings signaled DeFi moving into regulated capital-markets infrastructure.
Next edition announced: Breakpoint 2026 will be held in London, positioned in a major global financial hub.
